title: Autism Spectrum Disorder Caused by a Novel De Novo SCN2A Mutation: A Case Report
abstract: Case report of 6-year-old female with ASD, language delay, social communication disorder, WITHOUT epilepsy, carrying heterozygous SCN2A c.4023_4077del (p.Val1343Alafs*17) de novo frameshift. Reinforces SCN2A phenotype spectrum dissociation between ASD-only and ASD+epilepsy presentations.
summary: Case report of novel de novo SCN2A frameshift in 6-year-old with ASD and language delay but no seizures. Adds to evidence that SCN2A ASD-only vs ASD+epilepsy dissociation is a real phenotypic axis.
